title: Ambient Caves // Replaces cave sounds with realistic versions
description:
This pack replaces the spooky sounds that play with more ambient, natural sounds that are based on real life caves!
It works from versions 1.16.5 onwards and
it includes muffled wind, water dripping, bats and more!
body:
## Hello there! Are you ready for your caves to become realistic? Do you hate those haunting noises that play deep below the overworld? Do you just want your mining experience to be ambient? (If it says the pack is for a newer or an older version you can ignore it) Well this is the pack for you. This pack replaces the spooky sounds that play with more ambient, natural sounds that are based on real life caves! It works from versions 1.16.5 onwards! It includes muffled wind, water dripping, bats and more!

Preview video

## Pack not working? If there are no sounds at all, make sure the ambient/environment slider is turned up all of the way. Due to limitations I cannot alter the functionality of the ambience so they will play at the same frequency of the old ambience(when mood reaches 100%) If the game is still playing the regular sounds, make sure you have installed the pack correctly, there is no need to extract the downloaded file to use the pack, and if you have installed the pack correctly, please let me know and i will try my best to fix the problem. ## Credits All sounds are edited before being added to the pack. Credits go to Zapsplat for providing the original sounds
